constraints.message: GateToken.gatekeeper_key_id MUST equal the hounfour signer-key-id derivation (reuses signer_key_id_matches_derivation).
constraints.evaluation_note: LOCAL derivation builtin; gatekeeper_id is resolved from the trust-store by the consumer.

constraints.message: GateToken.replay_seed MUST be unpredictable to the worker and reproducible by a verifier holding the token (seed binds the gatekeeper signature over the head).
constraints.evaluation_note: Requires the gatekeeper's signature over span_log_head; verified consumer-side alongside the token signature.

constraints.expression: prev_token_hash chains to the prior token; gate_index 0 uses the genesis anchor
constraints.message: GateToken.prev_token_hash MUST chain the token sequence; gate 0 anchors with sha256:000...000 (LG-3b).
constraints.evaluation_note: Cross-token continuity; the genesis anchor is bound by the run receipt.

constraints.expression: ed25519 signature verifies over RFC8785 canonical json of all-other-fields, against the trust-store-resolved gatekeeper pubkey
constraints.message: GateToken.signature MUST verify; hounfour does not verify, consumer-side per NF-1. Keys resolve through the loa trust-store, never bare manifest publication.

constraints.expression: turnstile split predicate: across segments gate_index == next_span_index - 1 (wave 0); within fan-out wave_number > prior.wave_number at same gate_index
constraints.message: Turnstile advancement MUST satisfy the split predicate; the serial path (wave 0, gate_index bump) must work — the single-predicate form rejected every serial run after gate 0.
constraints.evaluation_note: Evaluated by the turnstile at dispatch; encoded here for vector coverage (serial-turnstile-regression fixture).
